visa_types.name: Student Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
For more information on documents required for a Student Visa, please Click Here
Please note:
The following documents must be officially translated:
- shenasnameh/marriage certificate (official translation, which is no more than 1 year old)
- school certificate (official translation, which is no more than 1 year old)
- property ownership (official translation, which is no more than 1 year old)
- sponsorship documents (official translation, which is no more than 3 months old)
visa_types.visa_fees:
[hun > irn > en > Table:Student Visa > Visa Fees 1]
Applicants applying at Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of Euro 27 in addition.
Please make sure to pay the EXACT stated amount.
- Applicants are requested to carry exact change in Euros to pay the fees for services used at the Visa Application Centre.
visa_types.forms:
To download the application form for a Student Visa, Click Here

To download the Appendix for an application for a residence permit (Pursuing studies or student mobility), Click Here
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa applies to those who intend to stay in Hungary for longer than 90 days for Student visa purposes. Please note that appointment is required for resident permit applicants.
For more information Click Here (http://oif.gov.hu/index.php?lang=en).
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa applies to those who intend to stay in Hungary for longer than 90 days for Student visa purposes. Please note that appointment is required for resident permit applicants.
For more information Click Here (http://oif.gov.hu/index.php?lang=en).

## Visa Fees

[hun > irn > en > Table:Student Visa > Visa Fees 1]
Applicants applying at Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of Euro 27 in addition.
Please make sure to pay the EXACT stated amount.
- Applicants are requested to carry exact change in Euros to pay the fees for services used at the Visa Application Centre.

## Documents Required
For more information on documents required for a Student Visa, please Click Here
Please note:
The following documents must be officially translated:
- shenasnameh/marriage certificate (official translation, which is no more than 1 year old)
- school certificate (official translation, which is no more than 1 year old)
- property ownership (official translation, which is no more than 1 year old)
- sponsorship documents (official translation, which is no more than 3 months old)

## Photo Specifications

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 1]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 2]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 3]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 4]

## Processing Time
Please visit http://oif.gov.hu/index.php?lang=en (http://oif.gov.hu/index.php?lang=en)

## Download Forms
To download the application form for a Student Visa, Click Here

To download the Appendix for an application for a residence permit (Pursuing studies or student mobility), Click Here

visa_types.name: Parents Accompanying Students
visa_types.documents_required:
Type " C " visa ( Schengen/Short Term visa category)- Information sheets / Checklists
 Please check the list of required documents before submitting your application. This will minimise chances of rejection of your visa application due to incorrect or inadequate documents
Parents Accompanying Students Visa Checklist

Please note:
- Translations must be no more than 1 year old.
Travel Medical Insurance:
Applicants for one or two entries must also prove that they are in possession of adequate and valid travel medical insurance, covering emergency medical, hospitalisation and repatriation (including in case of death). The minimum cover should be of 30,000 EUR. This insurance must be valid for the entire Schengen area and throughout the duration of the stay.
Applicants for a uniform visa for more than two entries (multiple entries) shall be in possession of travel medical insurance covering their stays; at the time of application, they need to prove that they have a travel medical insurance covering the period of their first intended visit, and sign the related statement in the application form. 
Iranian Travel Medical Insurance companies
visa_types.visa_fees:
[hun > irn > en > Table:Parents Accompanying Students > Visa Fees 1]
Please Note: 
- The applicable visa fee in EURO for each application and must be paid in cash. Please note that the notes used to make the payment must be undamaged.
- Applicant shall be charged a service fee of EURO 27 per application in addition to the visa fees.
- All fees are non-refundable.
- Applicants are requested to carry exact change in Euros to pay the fees for services used at the Visa Application Centre.
visa_types.processing_time:
Applications accepted at the Hungary Visa Application Centre will be submitted on the next working day to the Embassy of Hungary for a decision.
The visa processing time is a minimum of 21 calendar days, provided that a complete file is submitted. Please note: the process may take longer in certain cases.
All visa decisions are solely at the discretion of the Embassy of Hungary, Iran.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category; for more information on this, kindly refer to the documents required page.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category; for more information on this, kindly refer to the documents required page.

## Visa Fees

[hun > irn > en > Table:Parents Accompanying Students > Visa Fees 1]
Please Note: 
- The applicable visa fee in EURO for each application and must be paid in cash. Please note that the notes used to make the payment must be undamaged.
- Applicant shall be charged a service fee of EURO 27 per application in addition to the visa fees.
- All fees are non-refundable.
- Applicants are requested to carry exact change in Euros to pay the fees for services used at the Visa Application Centre.

## Documents Required
Type " C " visa ( Schengen/Short Term visa category)- Information sheets / Checklists
 Please check the list of required documents before submitting your application. This will minimise chances of rejection of your visa application due to incorrect or inadequate documents
Parents Accompanying Students Visa Checklist

Please note:
- Translations must be no more than 1 year old.
Travel Medical Insurance:
Applicants for one or two entries must also prove that they are in possession of adequate and valid travel medical insurance, covering emergency medical, hospitalisation and repatriation (including in case of death). The minimum cover should be of 30,000 EUR. This insurance must be valid for the entire Schengen area and throughout the duration of the stay.
Applicants for a uniform visa for more than two entries (multiple entries) shall be in possession of travel medical insurance covering their stays; at the time of application, they need to prove that they have a travel medical insurance covering the period of their first intended visit, and sign the related statement in the application form. 
Iranian Travel Medical Insurance companies

## Photo Specifications
Applicants need to submit their Application form with the new photo format, as explained below:
The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organisation).
- Use a white background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old.
- Portrait style photo (no posing) showing both edges of face clearly.
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.
Please follow these instructions carefully. If the photograph provided does not meet these requirements, your application will be considered incomplete.

## Processing Time
Applications accepted at the Hungary Visa Application Centre will be submitted on the next working day to the Embassy of Hungary for a decision.
The visa processing time is a minimum of 21 calendar days, provided that a complete file is submitted. Please note: the process may take longer in certain cases.
All visa decisions are solely at the discretion of the Embassy of Hungary, Iran.

## Download Forms
Visa Application Form

visa_types.name: Minors
visa_types.documents_required:
- Duly filled application form
- A valid passport, not older than 10 years – Passport should be valid for at least 90 days beyond your return date. At least 2 empty pages should be available in your passport
- Both, your passport and your residence permit in Iran must be valid for at least three months beyond the returning date of your trip.
- One recent colour passport size photo in white background
- Original birth certificate. Full birth certificates issued outside the EU must be duly translated into English and legalised by The Embassy of Hungary / Embassy of the origin country
                                                                            in Iran.
- Letter of consent for travel date, date of return, etc from the other parent. if only one parent is present when applying for a visa along with the child at the Hungary visa application
                                                                            centre. Passport copies of both parents must be provided. Or sole custody agreement in case of single parents.
- Fully booked and paid return flight tickets;
- Fully booked and paid hotel reservation OR a letter of invitation in original by your host in Hungary, signed by him/her and with a photocopy of his/her valid I.D. and his/her residence
                                                                            permit in Hungary if non-EU-citizen;,
- An original reference letter only by school or University. The letter should be addressed to ‘ The Embassy of Hungary, Tehran’
- Travel insurance covering the intended period of stay with a minimum coverage of EURO 30,000 for emergency hospital and return expenses.
Click here
- A photocopy of the documentation
- All supporting documents must not be older than 1 month
visa_types.visa_fees:
[hun > irn > en > Table:Minors > Visa Fees 1]
Please Note: 
- The applicable visa fee in EURO for each application and must be paid in cash. Please note that the notes used to make the payment must be undamaged.
- Applicant shall be charged a service fee of EURO 27 per application in addition to the visa fees.
- All fees are non-refundable.
- Applicants are requested to carry exact change in Euros to pay the fees for services used at the Visa Application Centre.
visa_types.processing_time:
Applications accepted at the Hungary Visa Application Centre will be submitted on the next working day to the Embassy of Hungary for a decision.
The visa processing time is a minimum of 21 calendar days, provided that a complete file is submitted. Please note: the process may take longer in certain cases.
All visa decisions are solely at the discretion of the Embassy of Hungary, Iran.

visa_types.name: Eea/eu Nationals
visa_types.documents_required:
- Duly filled application form
- A valid passport with two blank pages – Passport should be valid for at least 90 days beyond your return date
- Both your passport and your residence permit in the Iran must be valid for at least three months beyond the returning date of your trip;
- Two recent colour, passport size photos with white background
- Spouse’s original valid Passport
- Marriage Certificate in English accompanied by an Apostle if marriage has taken place outside the EU
- Birth Certificate in English accompanied by an Apostle if birth place of dependent is .outside the EU
- A photocopy of the documentation.
- Proof of travel with the EU National eg: flight tickets/ hotel bookings
Note: Marriage and full birth certificates issued outside the EU must be duly translated into English and legalised according to the 1961 Hague convention by The Embassy of Hungary
                                                                            / Embassy of the origin country in Iran.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[hun > irn > en > Table:Eea/eu Nationals > Visa Fees 1]
Please Note: 
- The applicable visa fee in EURO for each application and must be paid in cash. Please note that the notes used to make the payment must be undamaged.
- Applicant shall be charged a service fee of EURO 27 per application in addition to the visa fees.
- All fees are non-refundable.
- Applicants are requested to carry exact change in Euros to pay the fees for services used at the Visa Application Centre.
visa_types.processing_time:
Applications accepted at the Hungary Visa Application Centre will be submitted on the next working day to the Embassy of Hungary for a decision.
The visa processing time is a minimum of 21 calendar days, provided that a complete file is submitted. Please note: the process may take longer in certain cases.
All visa decisions are solely at the discretion of the Embassy of Hungary, Iran.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Family members of EEA citizens, who hold a blue coloured residence documentation in their passports with the document Type ’Residence Card Of A Family Member Of An Eea National’ Are not
                                                                        required to have a visa in order to travel to Hungary if either of the conditions below apply: 
- If joining the EU/EEA National in Hungary, providing the invitation letter and a copy of the ID of the EU national
- If traveling together with the EU/EEA National to Hungary.
Family members of EEA citizens not holding the above mentioned card, i.e. the residence card of a family member of an EEA national, need a visa to travel to Hungary. They
                                                                                should apply for a visa and prove that they are either traveling together with their EEA national family member(s) or traveling in order to meet their EEA national family
                                                                                member(s) (both cases should be proven by joint flight tickets or a letter from the EEA national family member and a single return flight ticket respectively) Please see other
                                                                                supporting documents required.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Family members of EEA citizens, who hold a blue coloured residence documentation in their passports with the document Type ’Residence Card Of A Family Member Of An Eea National’ Are not
                                                                        required to have a visa in order to travel to Hungary if either of the conditions below apply: 
- If joining the EU/EEA National in Hungary, providing the invitation letter and a copy of the ID of the EU national
- If traveling together with the EU/EEA National to Hungary.
Family members of EEA citizens not holding the above mentioned card, i.e. the residence card of a family member of an EEA national, need a visa to travel to Hungary. They
                                                                                should apply for a visa and prove that they are either traveling together with their EEA national family member(s) or traveling in order to meet their EEA national family
                                                                                member(s) (both cases should be proven by joint flight tickets or a letter from the EEA national family member and a single return flight ticket respectively) Please see other
                                                                                supporting documents required.

## Visa Fees

[hun > irn > en > Table:Eea/eu Nationals > Visa Fees 1]
Please Note: 
- The applicable visa fee in EURO for each application and must be paid in cash. Please note that the notes used to make the payment must be undamaged.
- Applicant shall be charged a service fee of EURO 27 per application in addition to the visa fees.
- All fees are non-refundable.
- Applicants are requested to carry exact change in Euros to pay the fees for services used at the Visa Application Centre.

## Documents Required
- Duly filled application form
- A valid passport with two blank pages – Passport should be valid for at least 90 days beyond your return date
- Both your passport and your residence permit in the Iran must be valid for at least three months beyond the returning date of your trip;
- Two recent colour, passport size photos with white background
- Spouse’s original valid Passport
- Marriage Certificate in English accompanied by an Apostle if marriage has taken place outside the EU
- Birth Certificate in English accompanied by an Apostle if birth place of dependent is .outside the EU
- A photocopy of the documentation.
- Proof of travel with the EU National eg: flight tickets/ hotel bookings
Note: Marriage and full birth certificates issued outside the EU must be duly translated into English and legalised according to the 1961 Hague convention by The Embassy of Hungary
                                                                            / Embassy of the origin country in Iran.

## Photo Specifications
Applicants need to submit their Application form with the new photo format, as explained below:
The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organisation).
- Use a white background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old.
- Portrait style photo (no posing) showing both edges of face clearly.
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.
Please follow these instructions carefully. If the photograph provided does not meet these requirements, your application will be considered incomplete.

## Processing Time
Applications accepted at the Hungary Visa Application Centre will be submitted on the next working day to the Embassy of Hungary for a decision.
The visa processing time is a minimum of 21 calendar days, provided that a complete file is submitted. Please note: the process may take longer in certain cases.
All visa decisions are solely at the discretion of the Embassy of Hungary, Iran.

## Download Forms
Visa Application Form

- Applicants are requested to carry exact change in Euros to pay the fees for services used at the Visa Application Centre.

## Documents Required
Type " C " visa ( Schengen/Short Term visa category)- Information sheets / Checklists
 Please check the list of required documents before submitting your application. This will minimise chances of rejection of your visa application due to incorrect or inadequate documents
Business Visa Checklist

Please note:
- Translations must be no more than 1 year old.
Travel Medical Insurance:
Applicants for one or two entries must also prove that they are in possession of adequate and valid travel medical insurance, covering emergency medical, hospitalisation and repatriation (including in case of death). The minimum cover should be of 30,000 EUR. This insurance must be valid for the entire Schengen area and throughout the duration of the stay.
Applicants for a uniform visa for more than two entries (multiple entries) shall be in possession of travel medical insurance covering their stays; at the time of application, they need to prove that they have a travel medical insurance covering the period of their first intended visit, and sign the related statement in the application form. 
Iranian Travel Medical Insurance companies

## Photo Specifications
Applicants need to submit their Application form with the new photo format, as explained below:
The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organisation).
- Use a white background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old.
- Portrait style photo (no posing) showing both edges of face clearly.
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.
Please follow these instructions carefully. If the photograph provided does not meet these requirements, your application will be considered incomplete.

## Processing Time
Applications accepted at the Hungary Visa Application Centre will be submitted on the next working day to the Embassy of Hungary for a decision.
The visa processing time is a minimum of 21 calendar days, provided that a complete file is submitted. Please note: the process may take longer in certain cases.
All visa decisions are solely at the discretion of the Embassy of Hungary, Iran.

## Download Forms
Visa Application Form

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is solely for the purpose of leisure travel including vacationing, cruising, sightseeing and other recreational activities. If during any portion of their visit to the Hungary the applicant intends to engage in business, or official duties he/she must refer to other relevant visa categories.

## Travel Medical Insurance:
Applicants for one or two entries must also prove that they are in possession of adequate and valid travel medical insurance, covering emergency medical, hospitalisation and repatriation (including in case of death). The minimum cover should be of 30,000 EUR. This insurance must be valid for the entire Schengen area and throughout the duration of the stay.
Applicants for a uniform visa for more than two entries (multiple entries) shall be in possession of travel medical insurance covering their stays; at the time of application, they need to prove that they have a travel medical insurance covering the period of their first intended visit, and sign the related statement in the application form.
